body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->

- Remove aerosol specification in the amip configs - only specify them in the atmos configs. Some amip configs had a shorter list of aerosols that overwrites the one in the atmos config. Note this will make the simulations a little slower, but I think it's better as this is what we want for amip.
- Add back SurfaceFluxes main to the nightly amip

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

title: clean up some configs

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Move Oceananigans and ClimaSeaIce component models into a new ClimaCouplerCMIPExt. I kept these models together since we use them both for CMIP, and we won't typically use one without the other.

## To-do
- [x] move files from experiments/ClimaEarth/components/ to ext/ClimaCouplerCMIPExt/
- [x] remove includes of these files in the code and instead load the extension (in the future we'll want to load it only in the CMIP driver, but for now we do it in setup_run.jl)
- [x] add weakdeps to ClimaCoupler env
- [x] resolve checked-in environments
- [x] remove dependence on ClimaAtmos of climaocean_helpers.jl (we should really move these helpers into ClimaCore)


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->


<!---
Review checklist

body: There was a missing double quote in the README. Found by @jm-c
title: Fix typo in README.md

body: Nightly AMIP is currently failing because `ClimaDiagnostics` is not imported when using `pkgversion` to check the version of ClimaDiagnostics. This PR adds the necessary imports and rename `ClimaDiagnostics` to `CD` in some cases.
title: Fix bug with missing imports
